description: Fix a broken email address and trim spaces
Fix punctuation: remove double periods and extra commas
input: Hello.. my name is Jane,, and I like coding..
expected_output: Hello. my name is Jane, and I like coding.

description: Fix malformed email in a sentence
input: Send report to alice@@company..org by friday
expected_output: Send report to alice@company.org by friday

input: Wait!! Are you sure??? This is great!!
expected_output: Wait! Are you sure? This is great!
